sentence_reviews.text: Hybrid sequence models interleave attention with state-space or recurrent blocks to combine content-addressable interaction with linear-time persistent state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Attention Is All You Need supports attention mechanisms; Mamba supports linear-time selective state-space sequence modeling; xLSTM supports recurrent sequence-model extensions.
sentence_reviews.notes: The definition synthesizes across source families; the packet lacks a dedicated hybrid architecture source.

sentence_reviews.text: They provide a design continuum between global attention quality and recurrent memory efficiency.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Transformer supports global attention; Mamba and xLSTM support efficient recurrent/state-space sequence modeling alternatives.
sentence_reviews.notes: Defensible synthesis, not a direct quote or single-source claim.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: Block balance, state handling, parallelism, and fair scaling comparisons remain architecture-specific.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited sources discuss different sequence-model efficiency and architectural tradeoffs, but not this exact hybrid limitation statement.
sentence_reviews.notes: Reasonable synthesis from architectural tradeoffs; not directly verified.

sentence_reviews.text: Transformer–SSM & recurrent hybrid models extends or specializes the architecture family Transformers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Attention Is All You Need defines the Transformer component family used in attention hybrids.
sentence_reviews.notes: The relationship is supported for the attention side of the hybrid taxonomy.

sentence_reviews.text: Transformer–SSM & recurrent hybrid models extends or specializes the architecture family Selective state-space models (Mamba family).
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Mamba defines selective state-space sequence models with linear-time sequence modeling.
sentence_reviews.notes: The source supports the SSM component family; hybrid specialization wording is taxonomy-level.

sentence_reviews.text: Transformer–SSM & recurrent hybrid models is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Gating & multiplicative control.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Mamba selective mechanisms, xLSTM gates, and Deep Learning recurrent-network background support gating as a common component.
sentence_reviews.notes: Supported across recurrent/SSM components, though not necessarily every hybrid model.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Transformer–SSM & recurrent hybrid models has a `composes` dependency on xLSTM & linear-recurrent hybrids with `common` strength.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph assertion.

edge_reviews.notes: Transformer component is core to the hybrid family by definition.
Selective SSM component is core for Transformer-SSM hybrids, though direct hybrid source is absent.
Gating is common in recurrent/SSM components, but not necessarily every hybrid.
